items.name: deer-flow
items.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

items.name: voicetree
items.description: The spatial IDE for recursive multi-agent orchestration. It's like an Obsidian graph-view that you work directly inside of.

items.name: sim
items.description: Build, deploy, and orchestrate AI agents. Sim is the central intelligence layer for your AI workforce.

items.name: osaurus
items.description: Own your AI. The native macOS harness for AI agents -- any model, persistent memory, autonomous execution, cryptographic identity. Built in Swift. Fully offline. Open source.

items.name: CodePilot
items.description: A multi-model AI agent desktop client — connect any AI provider, extend with MCP & skills, control from your phone. Built with Electron + Next.js.

items.name: pup
items.description: Give your AI agent a Pup — a CLI companion with 200+ commands across 33+ Datadog products.

items.name: vibe-remote
items.description: Your AI agent army, commanded from Slack/Discord/Wechat/Lark. Stream Claude Code, OpenCode, or Codex in real-time — from anywhere.

items.name: gptme
items.description: Your agent in your terminal, equipped with local tools: writes code, uses the terminal, browses the web. Make your own persistent autonomous agent on top!

items.name: goclaw
items.description: GoClaw - GoClaw is OpenClaw rebuilt in Go — with multi-tenant isolation, 5-layer security, and native concurrency. Deploy AI agent teams at scale without compromising on safety.

items.name: pipelock
items.description: Firewall for AI agents. DLP scanning, SSRF protection, bidirectional MCP scanning, tool poisoning detection, and prompt injection blocking.
